description: Fix-it minted during MA-24 verification. The operator's re-record is DONE and the pipeline replays end-to-end successfully (114s direct run, per-issue commits correct) — but tests/e2e.test.ts fails for four harness reasons found by orchestrator diagnosis: (1) STALE DIST: e2e invokes falcon-detective/dist/cli.js without building; record runs via tsx (source). A stale dist replayed with old model IDs → key mismatch → bogus 'cassette miss' (observed: dist had pre-MA-27 gemini-2.5-pro while cassettes were 3.1-keyed). Fix: build (tsc -p tsconfig.build.json) in beforeAll, or equivalent freshness guarantee. (2) WORKTREE LEAK: every failed/skipped run leaves .runs/e2e-test behind; the NEXT run dies instantly on 'worktree already exists', masking the real error. Fix: idempotent cleanup before run + always-cleanup after (keep on failure only under an explicit KEEP_RUN=1 debug env). (3) TIMEOUT: full replay is now ~114s pipeline + post-pipeline smoke; vitest testTimeout 120000 races and loses. Raise the e2e test timeout to 360s (test:full tier only; fast suite untouched). (4) CASSETTE DIR FALLBACK: gemini.ts cassetteDir() falls back to process.cwd()/fixtures/cassettes — a worker spawned from repo root silently resolves the wrong dir (already documented as a footgun comment in e2e.test.ts). Make the fallback package-anchored (resolve from the module's own location) and update that comment. Keep MA-26 fingerprint/guard semantics and e2e-guard tests green; extend e2e-guard coverage for the cleanup behavior if cheap. G-1: falcon-agent untouched.
title: Harden e2e harness: dist freshness, worktree cleanup, timeout, cassetteDir anchor
